title: GapLedgerEntry
description: Single NDJSON line from the gap ledger (.github/ai-state/gap-ledger.ndjson). Each entry records a discrete gap event from the planning loop — a worker failure, health gate block, launch rejection, plan drift, or stale migration row. Aligned with docs/ai-native/gap-ledger.md and docs/ai-native/gap-ledger-schema.md.

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the gap was recorded.

severity.description: Severity of the gap. low for stale rows and plan drift, medium for launch blocks, high for worker failures and stale workers, critical for health gate failures.

issue.description: GitHub issue number related to the gap.

pr.description: GitHub PR number related to the gap.

branch.description: Git branch or worktree name associated with the gap.

meta.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for downstream analysis (e.g. conflict group, blocking issue, exit code).
